name: Impossible Beef and Tomato Pie
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Beef, cooked; cut into bite-size pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a 13x9x2-inch baking dish.
3. Layer beef, onion, celery, tomatoes, and cheese in the dish.
4. Beat remaining ingredients together until smooth (15 seconds in a blender on high or 1 minute with an electric mixer on high).
5. Pour mixture into the dish.
6. Bake for 40-50 minutes, or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Allow to cool for 5 minutes before serving.
8. Garnish with parsley sprigs if desired. Serves: 8-10.
9. At high altitudes, bake for 70-75 minutes.
